initiatives.name: Radical Rest
initiatives.description: A healing justice collective of practitioners and educators centering the holistic wellness needs of BIPOC communities through culturally responsive health justice events and anti-oppressive education. Provides free wellness services and support through mutual aid initiatives.

initiatives.name: Free Fridge Salem
initiatives.description: We are a local mutual aid project started to help our neighbors with food insecurity and basic human needs like personal hygiene products, harm reduction supplies and seasonal aid offerings.
